summary: S&P 500 essentially flat at 7,138 (-0.02%), Nasdaq up 0.04% to 24,673, Dow fell 280 pts (-0.57%) to 48,861. Fed held rates 3.5-3.75% with historic 8-4 dissent. Oil rose on Trump Iran blockade reports. S&P 500 on pace for best month since 2020 (+9.3% April). Big Tech (Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta) reporting earnings this week.
